languages.text:
Deal 1 impact damage to a target and pull it to a nearby cell. If the target is bigger than you, you're pulled instead. If you have melee weapon equipped, perform an attack afterwards.
Range -- {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d}

traits.locale_text:
Deal 1 impact damage to a target and pull it to a nearby cell. If the target is bigger than you, you're pulled instead. If you have melee weapon equipped, perform an attack afterwards.
Range -- {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d}

languages.text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.
languages.original_text:
Deal 1 impact damage to a target and pull it to a nearby cell. If the target is bigger than you, you're pulled instead. If you have melee weapon equipped, perform an attack afterwards.
Range -- {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d}

traits.locale_text: The user deals 1 impact damage to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and moves them to a cell adjacent to themselves. If that enemy is larger than the user, the user is moved to a cell adjacent to that enemy instead. If the user has a melee weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

The user deals 1 impact damage to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and moves them to a cell adjacent to themselves. If that enemy is larger than the user, the user is moved to a cell adjacent to that enemy instead. If the user has a melee weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and moves them to a cell adjacent to themselves. If that enemy is larger than the user, the user is moved to a cell adjacent to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

languages.text: Обладатель аугмента наносит 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}ударный урон{/g} противнику в пределах {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} клеток и перемещает его на соседнюю с собой клетку. Если этот противник больше обладателя аугмента, вместо этого обладатель аугмента перемещается на соседнюю с ним клетку. Если у обладателя аугмента экипировано оружие {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнего боя{/g}, он атакует этого противника.
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and moves them to a cell adjacent to themselves. If that enemy is larger than the user, the user is moved to a cell adjacent to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: Обладатель аугмента наносит 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}ударный урон{/g} противнику в пределах {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} клеток и перемещает его на соседнюю с собой клетку. Если этот противник больше обладателя аугмента, вместо этого обладатель аугмента перемещается на соседнюю с ним клетку. Если у обладателя аугмента экипировано оружие {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнего боя{/g}, он атакует этого противника.

Обладатель аугмента наносит 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}ударный урон{/g} противнику в пределах {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} клеток и перемещает его на соседнюю с собой клетку. Если этот противник больше обладателя аугмента, вместо этого обладатель аугмента перемещается на соседнюю с ним клетку. Если у обладателя аугмента экипировано оружие {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнего боя{/g}, он атакует этого противника.

languages.text: El usuario inflige 1 de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}daño de impacto{/g} a un enemigo situado en un radio de {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} casillas y lo atrae hacia sí mismo. Si el enemigo es de mayor tamaño que el usuario, es el usuario quien se ve atraído hacia el enemigo. Si el usuario empuña un arma {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}cuerpo a cuerpo{/g}, ataca a ese enemigo.
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: El usuario inflige 1 de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}daño de impacto{/g} a un enemigo situado en un radio de {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} casillas y lo atrae hacia sí mismo. Si el enemigo es de mayor tamaño que el usuario, es el usuario quien se ve atraído hacia el enemigo. Si el usuario empuña un arma {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}cuerpo a cuerpo{/g}, ataca a ese enemigo.

languages.text: Der Nutzer fügt einem Gegner in einem Radius von {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} Feldern 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}Aufprallschaden{/g} zu und zieht ihn zu sich. Ist der Gegner größer als der Nutzer, wird Letzterer zum Gegner gezogen. Hat der Nutzer eine {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfwaffe{/g} ausgerüstet, attackiert er diesen Gegner.
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: Der Nutzer fügt einem Gegner in einem Radius von {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} Feldern 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}Aufprallschaden{/g} zu und zieht ihn zu sich. Ist der Gegner größer als der Nutzer, wird Letzterer zum Gegner gezogen. Hat der Nutzer eine {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampf{/g}waffe ausgerüstet, attackiert er diesen Gegner.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, en fazla {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} hücre uzaktaki bir düşmana 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}darbe hasarı{/g} verir ve o düşmanı kendisine doğru çeker. Bu düşman, kullanıcıdan büyükse onun yerine kullanıcı, düşmana çekilir. Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş{/g} silahı kuşanmışsa o düşmana saldırır.
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, en fazla {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} hücre uzaktaki bir düşmana 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}darbe hasarı{/g} verir ve o düşmanı kendisine doğru çeker. Bu düşman, kullanıcıdan büyükse onun yerine kullanıcı, düşmana çekilir. Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş{/g} silahı kuşanmışsa o düşmana saldırır.

languages.text: L'utilisateur inflige 1 point de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}dégâts d'impact{/g} à un ennemi dans un rayon de {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cases et l’attire vers lui. Si cet ennemi est plus grand que lui, les rôles s'inversent et c'est l'utilisateur qui est attiré. S'il est équipé d'une arme de {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}mêlée{/g}, il attaque l'ennemi.
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: L'utilisateur inflige 1 point de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}dégâts d'impact{/g} à un ennemi dans un rayon de {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cases et l’attire vers lui. Si cet ennemi est plus grand que lui, les rôles s'inversent et c'est l'utilisateur qui est attiré. S'il est équipé d'une arme de {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}mêlée{/g}, il attaque l'ennemi.

languages.text: 使用者对{uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d}格内的一名敌人造成1点{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}冲击伤害{/g}，并将该敌人拉向自身。如果该敌人体型大于使用者，则改为将使用者拉向该敌人。如果使用者装备了{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战{/g}武器，则会攻击该敌人。
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: 使用者对{uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d}格内的一名敌人造成1点{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}冲击伤害{/g}，并将该敌人拉向自身。如果该敌人体型大于使用者，则改为将使用者拉向该敌人。如果使用者装备了{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战{/g}武器，则会攻击该敌人。

languages.text: 使用者は{uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d}マス以内の敵に1の{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}衝撃ダメージ{/g}を与え、その敵を自分の元へ引き寄せる。その敵が使用者より大きい場合は、代わりに使用者がその敵の元へ引き寄せられる。使用者が{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接{/g}武器を装備している場合、その敵を攻撃する。
languages.original_text: The user deals 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to an enemy within {uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d} cells and pulls that enemy to themselves. If the enemy is larger than the user, the user is pulled to that enemy instead. If the user has a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapon equipped, they attack that enemy.

traits.locale_text: 使用者は{uip|Range|ea9d6dd442d34403a3e4228ba6178a5d}マス以内の敵に1の{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}衝撃ダメージ{/g}を与え、その敵を自分の元へ引き寄せる。その敵が使用者より大きい場合は、代わりに使用者がその敵の元へ引き寄せられる。使用者が{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接{/g}武器を装備している場合、その敵を攻撃する。
